source: Verified empirically on-device (torch.cuda.get_device_name) + project memory project_kernel_optimization.md; consumer Blackwell has NO TMA pipeline so num_stages>1 is unusable (distinct from B200/SM100).

specs.notes: fused_cca_prologue uses NO shared memory (register-resident, D=32 fits). Bank-conflict freedom is therefore vacuous; coalescing of the D-contiguous global accesses is the relevant memory property.
